zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Grey於1384年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，她的父親Sir Robert de Grey35歲，母親Elizabeth de la Plaunche37歲。她於1400年2月17日之前與John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年11月20日在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯享年24歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan de Grey于1384年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，她的父亲Sir Robert de Grey35岁，母亲Elizabeth de la Plaunche37岁。她于1400年2月17日之前与John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1408年11月20日在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯享年24岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Grey was born in 1384, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Robert de Grey, was 35 and her mother, Elizabeth de la Plaunche, was 37. She married John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt before 17 February 1400, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 20 November 1408, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 24, and was buried in Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Grey est née en 1384, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert de Grey, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de la Plaunche, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt avant 17 février 1400, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 novembre 1408, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterrée à Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

Februar 1400 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Lei sposato John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt prima del 17 febbraio 1400, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 novembre 1408, nel Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 24 anni, e fu sepolta a Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan de Greyが1384年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir Robert de Greyは35歳，母Elizabeth de la Plauncheは37歳であった。1400年2月17日以前にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアでJohn Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1408年11月20日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズで24歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Grey(이)가 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert de Grey(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de la Plaunche(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1400년 2월 17일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 11월 20일 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan de Grey nasceu em 1384, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert de Grey, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de la Plaunche, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt antes 17 de fevereiro de 1400, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1408, em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 24 anos, e foi sepultada em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Grey родилась в 1384 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Robert de Grey было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de la Plaunche, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Deincourt 4th Baron Deincourt перед 17 февраль 1400 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 ноября 1408 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 24 лет и была похоронена в местности оксфордшир, Англия.

Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1408, en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 24 años, y fue sepultada en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
